afterSnapshot.name: testComputeBestWindow

context.userMessage: Approved — go ahead and build it. Run the tests and type checks to verify nothing is broken, and show me what changed.

rationale: Unit-test the pure window-finding algorithm without network, covering the core "calmest = lowest combined wind+gust" rule.
implementation: Crafts an hourly array where indices 3-5 are clearly the calmest block and asserts startIndex, averages, score, hour count, and a non-empty reason string.
